title: Dubai introduces new safety law: Violators could face Dh2 million fines in UAE emirate
summary_full: Dubai has enacted a new law, effective June 1, 2026, to bolster public safety across the emirate. This comprehensive legislation introduces stricter regulations for venues, events, buildings and recreational areas, aiming to prevent accidents and protect residents and visitors. Significant fines will be imposed for violations, reinforcing Dubai's commitment to being a secure global hub.
